tr: Seal of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Single seal impression without patronymic. Common on debt notes and legal documents.

tr: Seal of {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Single seal with patronymic. Most common seal formula.

tr: Seal of {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}, seal of {PN3_TR} son of {PN4_TR}.
notes: Two seal impressions in sequence.

tl: KIŠIB {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} KIŠIB {PN3_TL} DUMU {PN4_TL} KIŠIB {PN5_TL} DUMU {PN6_TL}
tr: Seal of {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}, seal of {PN3_TR} son of {PN4_TR}, seal of {PN5_TR} son of {PN6_TR}.
notes: Three seal impressions in sequence. Common on multi-party legal documents.

tr: Seal of the {PLACE_TR} colony.
notes: Colony institutional seal.

tr: Seal of the {PLACE_TR} colony in plenary session.
notes: Colony seal from full assembly. sa-he-er GAL = small and great = plenary.

tr: Sealed by {PN1_TR}.
notes: Alternative translation using 'sealed by' instead of 'seal of'.

tr: To {PN1_TR}; seal of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Seal formula combined with addressee.

tr: To {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}; seal of {PN3_TR} son of {PN4_TR}.
notes: Seal formula with full patronymics for both addressee and sealer.

tl: a-na sa ki-ma i-a-ti u {PN1_TL} KIŠIB {PN2_TL}
tr: To my representatives and {PN1_TR}; seal of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Seal addressed to representatives and a named person.

tr: Seal of {PN1_TR}, scribe.
notes: Seal of the scribe who wrote the tablet.

tr: In the presence of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Single witness without patronymic. IGI = before/in the presence of.

tr: In the presence of {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Witness with patronymic. Standard witness entry.

tr: Witnessed by {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Alternative translation with 'Witnessed by'.

tr: Witnessed by {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}, by {PN3_TR} son of {PN4_TR}.
notes: Two witnesses in a single clause.

tr: In the presence of {PN1_TR}, of {PN2_TR}, of {PN3_TR}.
notes: Three witnesses without patronymics.

tr: Witnessed by {PN1_TR}, by {PN2_TR}, by {PN3_TR}, by {PN4_TR}.
notes: Four witnesses in sequence.

tl: IGI {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} IGI {PN3_TL} DUMU {PN4_TL} IGI {PN5_TL} DUMU {PN6_TL}
tr: Witnessed by {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}, by {PN3_TR} son of {PN4_TR}, by {PN5_TR} son of {PN6_TR}.
notes: Three witnesses each with patronymics.

tr: Witnessed by {PN1_TR}, the scribe.
notes: Scribe listed as witness.

tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} was our (absent) partner.
notes: The absent partner formula. A party not present at proceedings but represented.

tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} was my absent partner.
notes: Singular variant: my partner instead of our.

tl: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ka-ru-um {PLACE_TL} i-di-ni-a-ti-ma IGI GIR sa A-šur si-bu-ti-ni ni-di-in
tr: The {PLACE_TR} colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
notes: Most frequent legal formula (118+ matches). Colony assigns arbitrators and testimony before dagger.

tl: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ka-ru-um {PLACE_TL} sa-he-er GAL i-di-ni-a-ti-ma IGI GIR sa A-šur si-bu-ti-ni ni-di-in
tr: The {PLACE_TR} colony in plenary session gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
notes: Plenary session variant of colony proceedings formula.

tl: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ka-ru-um {PLACE_TL} i-di-ni-a-ti-ma tup-pa-am IGI GIR sa A-šur si-bu-ti-ni ni-di-in
tr: The {PLACE_TR} colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet with our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
notes: Variant mentioning the tablet explicitly.

tl: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim wa-bar-tum sa {PLACE_TL} i-di-ni-a-ti-ma tup-pa-am IGI GIR sa a-šur si-bu-ti-ni ni-di-in
tr: The station at {PLACE_TR} gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet with our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
notes: Station (wabarum) variant instead of colony (karum). Smaller trading outposts.

tl: GIR sa A-šur is-bu-tu-ni-ma {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} pa-su-nu is-me-u-ni
tr: they seized Aššur's dagger and {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} heard their statement.
notes: Physical grasping of the dagger as oath-taking, with adjudicator hearing the statement.

tr: {PN1_TR} was the attorney.
notes: Identifies the attorney (rabisuum) for the proceedings.

tr: {PN1_TR} was the attorney for the goods.
notes: Attorney specifically for merchandise/goods.

tr: the attorney of {PN1_TR}'s firm.
notes: Attorney designated for a specific merchant's firm.

tr: {PN1_TR} was our third man.
notes: Third-party mediator in legal proceedings.

tr: {PN1_TR}, {PN2_TR}'s representative.
notes: Person acting as representative (sa kima = who is like) for another.

tr: The investors of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Identifies the investors (ummeanum) associated with a trader.

tr: {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR}, these men acted as judges.
notes: Identifies the judges at the end of a verdict record.

tr: {PN1_TR} impressed on us what had been sworn by the City.
notes: Formally reminding the assembly of an oath sworn by the City.

tl: {PN1_TL} ki-ma a-ha-ti-su a-hi-su u a-ha-at a-bi-su it-ma
tr: {PN1_TR} swore on behalf of his sister, his brother and his father's sister.
notes: Swearing the oath on behalf of absent family members.

tr: This tablet contains the oath by {PN1_TR}.
notes: Identifies the tablet as an oath record.

tr: Come on, let us go to {PLACE_TR}.
notes: Exhortation to travel for legal proceedings.

tr: If anyone raises claim against {PN1_TR}, {PN2_TR} will clear him.
notes: Guarantee formula. Guarantor promises to resolve future claims against the buyer.

tr: If they do raise claim, {PN1_TR} and the attorney will clear them.
notes: Combined guarantee with attorney support.

tl: su-ma ma-ma-an a-su-mi {ITEM_TL} a-na {PN1_TL} i-tu-a-ar {PN2_TL} {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-sa-qu-lu
tr: If anybody raises a claim against {PN1_TR} because of the {ITEM_TR}, {PN2_TR} will pay {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Guarantee with specific monetary penalty. Used in purchase contracts.

tr: {PN1_TR} is guarantor.
notes: Simple guarantor designation.

tr: {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} had themselves registered as guarantors.
notes: Formal registration as guarantors.

tl: E-be-tum sa a-lim{ki} sa {PN1_TL} e-ru-ba-at KU
tr: {PN1_TR}'s house in the City serves as security for the silver.
notes: House pledged as collateral for a silver debt.

tr: {PN1_TR} must not raise claim against {PN2_TR}.
notes: Non-claim prohibition. Very common (39+ instances).

tr: {PN1_TR} must not raise claim against them for {PN2_TR}'s debt.
notes: Non-claim specifically tied to a named person's debt.

tr: If {PN1_TR} says:
notes: Protest clause opener. Introduces hypothetical objection.

tl: su-ma tup-pu-um sa {PN1_TL} i-se-er {PN2_TL} it-ba-am tup-pu-um sa-ar
tr: If any tablet of {PN1_TR} against {PN2_TR} turns up, that tablet is false.
notes: Tablet invalidation formula.

tr: {PN1_TR} seized us against {PN2_TR}, and {PN1_TR} said to {PN2_TR}:
notes: Standard legal proceedings opener (47+ instances).

tl: {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} a-na {PN3_TL} DUMU {PN4_TL} is-ba-at-ni-a-ti-ma um-ma {PN1_TL}-ma a-na {PN3_TL}-ma
tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} seized us in his case against {PN3_TR} son of {PN4_TR}, and {PN1_TR} said to {PN3_TR}:
notes: Seizure formula with full patronymics.

tr: {PN1_TR} seized {PN2_TR} by his hem whereupon {PN2_TR} said:
notes: Physical seizure by the garment hem.

tr: {PN1_TR}, representing {PN2_TR}, seized {PN3_TR} and {PN1_TR} said:
notes: Seizure on behalf of someone else.

tr: {PN1_TR} had hired an attorney against {PN2_TR}.
notes: Attorney hired for proceedings against another party.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ha-bu-la-ti la ha-bu-la-ti u-la ik-ri u-la ka-i-na-ni
tr: Confirm or deny that you owe me {AMT_TR} of silver!
notes: Formal demand for confirmation or denial of debt.

tr: {PN1_TR} will produce witnesses against {PN2_TR}.
notes: One party producing witnesses against another.

tr: {PN1_TR} led {PN2_TR} to the Gate of the God because of
notes: Led to the Gate of the God for divine judgment.

tr: 1 tablet stating that {PN1_TR} owes {AMT_TR} to {PN2_TR};
notes: Debt note. Lists amount owed, debtor and creditor.

tr: 1 tablet concerning {AMT_TR}, debt of {PN1_TR};
notes: Alternative debt note formula.

tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of refined silver to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Standard debt formula with refined silver.

tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of gold to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Gold debt formula.

tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} owes {AMT_TR} of washed copper to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Copper debt formula.

tr: Yes, I owe you {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Admission of debt in legal proceedings.

tr: I do not owe anything to {PN1_TR}.
notes: Denial of debt.

tr: You owe {AMT_TR} of silver and its interest to {PN1_TR}.
notes: Accusation of debt with interest.

tr: he will add {AMT_TR} as interest per month.
notes: Interest rate clause.

tl: su-ma la is-qul {AMT_TL} GÍN.TA a ma-na-im i-na ITU.KAM si-ib-tam u-sa-ab
tr: If he has not paid, he will add {AMT_TR} per mina per month as interest.
notes: Interest clause specifying rate per mina per month.

tl: is-tu ha-mu-us-tim sa {PN1_TL} a-na {NUM_TL} ha-am-sa-tim i-sa-qal
tr: From the week of {PN1_TR} he will pay within {NUM_TR} weeks.
notes: Payment deadline counted from a hamustum week-eponymy.

tr: He will pay within {NUM_TR} months.
notes: Payment deadline in months.

tr: {PN1_TR} has been paid in full.
notes: Confirmation that creditor is satisfied.

tr: Their case concerning {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR}.
notes: Case header identifying the parties in dispute.

tr: {PN1_TR} married {PN2_TR}.
notes: Basic marriage statement.

tr: {PN1_TR} married {PN2_TR} as a slave girl.
notes: Marriage with amtum (slave-wife) status.

tr: If {PN1_TR} divorces her, he will pay {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Divorce penalty for the husband.

tr: If {PN1_TR} divorces him, she will pay {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Divorce penalty for the wife.

tl: su-ma a-na be-ti-su u am-ti-su ta-ta-hi-i {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR ta-sa-qal
tr: If you have touched his house and his slave-girls, you must return {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Penalty clause for violating restriction during husband's absence.

tr: {PN2_TR} bought the slave-girl from {PN1_TR}.
notes: Slave purchase formula.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver, the price of a slave-girl, {PN1_TR} has received.
notes: Receipt of silver for a slave sale.

tl: E sa {PN1_TL} a-na {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR a-na {PN2_TL} i-di-nu-ma
tr: The house of {PN1_TR} they sold to {PN2_TR} for {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: House sale formula.

tr: With the price for their house {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} are satisfied.
notes: Sellers confirm satisfaction with house sale price.

tl: E-tu sa {PLACE_TL} u u-tu-up-tum sa {PN1_TL} {PN2_TL} la ta-hu
tr: The house in {PLACE_TR} and its furniture belong to {PN1_TR}, {PN2_TR} is not entitled to it.
notes: Property ownership declaration.

tr: {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} divided and {PN1_TR} took his share.
notes: Estate division formula between heirs.

tr: {PN1_TR} took his share and the tuzinnum of the {TITLE_TR}.
notes: tuzinnum = the extra share of the eldest son in inheritance.

tr: the blood-money for {PN1_TR}.
notes: Blood money (compensation for killing or injury).

tr: If he conceals anything, he will pay {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Penalty clause for concealment.

tl: {PN1_TL} a-di {NUM_TL} sa-na-at is-ti {PN2_TL} us-sa-ab la i-sa-mu-hu-ma su-ma is-ta-mu-hu-ma it-ti-si {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-sa-qal
tr: {PN1_TR} will stay in {PN2_TR}'s employ for {NUM_TR} years, will not break the agreement; if he breaks the agreement and leaves, he pays {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Service/employment contract with penalty for breach.

tl: su-ma ma-am-man ib-ba-ri-su-nu is-se-er a-bi-im um-mi-im is-al-la mi-ma u-pa-za-ar {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-sa-qal
tr: If either of them harms the father or mother or conceals anything, he will pay {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Penalty clause protecting parents from harm or concealment.

tr: Month {MONTH_TR}, eponymy of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Date formula with month name and eponym year.

tr: Month {MONTH_TR}, eponymy of {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Date formula with month and eponym with patronymic.

tr: From the week of {PN1_TR}, month {MONTH_TR}, eponymy of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Full date formula with hamustum week, month and eponymy.

tr: From the week of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Hamustum week reference, used as starting date for obligations.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver, the tithe, we collected from {PN1_TR} in {PLACE_TR}.
notes: Tithe collection formula.

tr: {AMT_TR}, saddu'atu-tax, we levied from {PN1_TR} in {PLACE_TR}.
notes: Transport tariff (saddu'atum) collection formula.

tr: Under our seals {PN1_TR} is bringing it to the colony.
notes: Goods being transported under sealed containers.

tl: su-ma a-di {NUM_TL} u4-me-e {PN1_TL} la i-li-ka-ma a-wa-tam la i-di-nam
tr: If {PN1_TR} has not come within {NUM_TR} days and answered me in court,
notes: Conditional clause with deadline for court appearance.

tl: su-ma a-di ITU.{NUM_TL}.KAM a-na {PLACE_TL} la ta-li-kam-ma a-wa-tam la ta-di-nam
tr: If you have not come to {PLACE_TR} within {NUM_TR} months and answered me in court,
notes: Conditional clause with month deadline and specific venue.

tl: su-ma a-na ITU.{NUM_TL}.KAM la is-qul {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR a-na {PN1_TL} i-sa-qal
tr: If he has not paid within {NUM_TR} months, he will pay {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN1_TR}.
notes: Payment deadline with penalty clause.

tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Basic patronymic chain. DUMU = son of.

tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} son of {PN3_TR}.
notes: Three-generation patronymic chain.

tr: {PN1_TR} daughter of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Female patronymic. DUMU.MI = daughter of.

tr: the sons of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Collective reference to sons. DUMU.MES = sons of.

tr: {PN1_TR}, the wife of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Wife designation. DAM = wife of.

tr: {PN1_TR}, brother of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Brother designation.

tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}, the {OCC_TR}.
notes: Patronymic with occupation or title.

tr: {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} settled accounts with the result that they are fully settled.
notes: Account settlement formula.

tl: {PN1_TL} u {PN2_TL} u4-ma-ma u-za-ku-ru-ma a-sar i-ma-gu5-ru-ni e-ta-wu
tr: {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} on this very day must make declarations, and they must discuss in order to come to an agreement.
notes: Colony verdict ordering parties to negotiate.

tr: {PN1_TR} said to {PN2_TR}:
notes: Direct speech introduction in legal proceedings.

tr: {PN1_TR} answered:
notes: Response in legal dialogue.

tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} answered: "I shall personally give it to you."
notes: Promise to pay personally.

tr: {PN1_TR} answered: "I will add (the interest)."
notes: Agreement to pay interest.

tr: {PN1_TR} answered: "They are my sealings."
notes: Acknowledgment of seal impressions.

tr: {PN1_TR} answered: "Yes, I have taken what belongs to {PN2_TR}."
notes: Admission of having taken property.

tr: {PN1_TR} answered: "Show me that tablet then I will pay {COMMODITY_TR}."
notes: Conditional agreement to pay upon seeing evidence.

tr: I act on behalf of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Declaration of acting as representative.

tr: {PN1_TR} entrusted (the goods) under seal to {PN2_TR} and {PN3_TR}.
notes: Entrustment of sealed goods to transporters.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR a-na hu-bu-ul a-bi-ku-nu KÙ.BABBAR u-sa-qi-il5
tr: I have paid {AMT_TR} of silver for your father's debt.
notes: Claim of having paid someone else's inherited debt.

tl: su-ma a-na ITU.{NUM_TL}.KAM {PN1_TL} tup-pa-am la i-ta-ab-lam {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR a-na {PN2_TL} i-sa-qal
tr: If within {NUM_TR} months {PN1_TR} does not bring the tablet, {PN1_TR} will pay {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN2_TR}.
notes: Penalty for failing to produce evidence within deadline.

tr: {PN1_TR} has released the tablet concerning {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN2_TR}.
notes: Release of a debt tablet. Obligation fulfilled.

tr: {PN1_TR} has written a debt note.
notes: Creation of a new debt record.

tl: {AMT_TL} KU.GI i-na na-ru-qi-su KI um-me-a-ni-su su-mi {PN1_TL} i-la-pa-at
tr: he will book {AMT_TR} of gold in his joint-stock capital together with his investors in the name of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Booking gold in joint-stock capital (naruqqum) in someone's name.

tl: nu-si-ib-ma ni-is A-lim{ki} it-mu-u-ma a-na {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-mi-ig-ru
tr: We sat down and they swore an oath by the City and agreed on {AMT_TR} of silver.
notes: Negotiation + oath + agreed amount. Common resolution formula.

tl: ka-ru-um di-nam i-di-in-ma a-di da-mu sa {PN1_TL} i-ka-su-du-ni
tr: The colony passed a verdict, to the effect that until they acquire the blood-money for {PN1_TR},
notes: Colony verdict regarding blood-money. Usually followed by restrictions.

tl: a-na {AMT_TL} URUDU a-na ar-nim ka-ru-um i-di-ni
tr: The colony imposed a penalty on me of {AMT_TR} of copper.
notes: Colony-imposed fine. arnum = penalty/crime. Typically copper.

tl: a-na qu-bu-ur {PN1_TL} um-mi-su-nu a-na gam-ri-im u hu-bu-ul {PN1_TL} um-mi-su-nu {PN2_TL} i-za-az
tr: The tomb of their mother {PN1_TR} and the expenses and debts of their mother {PN1_TR} are the responsibility of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Tomb and funeral expenses assigned to specific heir. Inheritance context.

tl: {AMT_TL} URUDU si-im qa-qi-ri sa E {PN1_TL} KI {PN2_TL}
tr: {AMT_TR} of copper from the price for a house-plot of {PN1_TR} is due from {PN2_TR}.
notes: House-plot (qaqirum) price. Real estate transaction.

tl: {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR sa-ru-pa-am i-na si-im {ITEM_TL} il5-qe
tr: {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR} has received {AMT_TR} of refined silver from the proceeds of {ITEM_TR}.
notes: Receipt of silver from sale proceeds.

tl: {PN1_TL} is-tu A-lim{ki} i-na e-la-i-su a-na {PN2_TL} i-sa-qal
tr: {PN1_TR} will pay to {PN2_TR} when he comes up from the City.
notes: Payment promised upon return from the City of Assur.

tr: Before {PN1_TR}.
notes: Witness with "Before" convention (13x in training).

tr: Before {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Witness with patronymic, "Before" convention.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is {PN1_TL} ù {PN2_TL} a-na {PN3_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} are jointly responsible for the silver; they will pay {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Joint liability (i-na variant, short). 'Jointly responsible' convention.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ù ke-ni-šu-nu ra-ki-is {PN1_TL} ù {PN2_TL} a-na {PN3_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} are jointly liable for the silver; they will pay {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Joint liability (i-na variant, with keni). 'Jointly liable' convention.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is {PN1_TL} ù {PN2_TL} a-na {PN3_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: The silver is bound to the head of their solvent ones; {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} will pay {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Joint liability (i- variant, short). 'Bound to the head' convention.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ù ke-ni-šu-nu ra-ki-is {PN1_TL} ù {PN2_TL} a-na {PN3_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: The silver is bound to the head of their solvent and reliable ones; {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} will pay {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Joint liability (i- variant, with keni). 'Bound to the head' convention.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ù ke-ni-šu-nu ra-ki-is {PN1_TL} ù {PN2_TL} a-na {PN3_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} are jointly responsible for {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Joint liability (i-na variant, keni). Short 'jointly responsible' convention.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is {PN1_TL} ù {PN2_TL} a-na {PN3_TL} i-ša-qal
tr: {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} are jointly liable for {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN3_TR}.
notes: Joint liability (i- variant, short). Short 'jointly liable' convention.

tr: Seal of the karum {PLACE_TR}.
notes: Karum variant of colony seal.

tl: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ka-ru-um {PLACE_TL} i-di-ni-a-ti-ma IGI GIR sa A-šur si-bu-ti-ni ni-di-in
tr: The karum {PLACE_TR} gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
notes: Karum variant of colony proceedings formula.

tr: The karum {PLACE_TR}, small and great, passed a verdict:
notes: Karum variant of colony verdict.

tr: {PN1_TR}, messenger of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Messenger (siprum) variant of representative.

tr: {PN1_TR}, agent of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Agent (sazuztum) variant of representative.

tr: The colony of {PLACE_TR}, small and great, passed a judgment:
notes: Judgment variant of colony verdict.

tr: The colony of {PLACE_TR}, small and great, passed a decision:
notes: Decision variant of colony verdict.

tr: Sealed by {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}.
notes: Sealed by variant with patronymic.

tr: Sealed by {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}, sealed by {PN3_TR} son of {PN4_TR}.
notes: Sealed by variant, two impressions.

tl: KIŠIB {PN1_TL} DUMU {PN2_TL} KIŠIB {PN3_TL} DUMU {PN4_TL} KIŠIB {PN5_TL} DUMU {PN6_TL}
tr: Sealed by {PN1_TR} son of {PN2_TR}, sealed by {PN3_TR} son of {PN4_TR}, sealed by {PN5_TR} son of {PN6_TR}.
notes: Sealed by variant, three impressions.

tr: Sealed by the {PLACE_TR} colony.
notes: Sealed by variant of colony seal.

tr: Sealed by {PN1_TR}, scribe.
notes: Sealed by variant for scribe seal.

tr: Our father's firm in {PLACE_TR} is security for {PN1_TR}.
notes: E = firm when with father/merchant reference.

tl: E-tu sa {PLACE_TL} u u-tu-up-tum sa {PN1_TL} {PN2_TL} la ta-hu
tr: The firm in {PLACE_TR} and its furniture belong to {PN1_TR}, {PN2_TR} is not entitled to it.
notes: Firm variant of house_belongs_to.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver is deposited in the office of the {PLACE_TR} colony.
notes: E karim = office of the colony.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-na E a-lim{ki} a-na {PN1_TL} a-di-in
tr: I gave {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN1_TR} in the office of the City.
notes: E alim = office of the City.

tr: {PN1_TR} spoke to {PN2_TR} as follows:
notes: Spoke to (qabum verb iq-bi) variant of said to.

tr: {PN1_TR} spoke to {PN2_TR} and said:
notes: Spoke to (awum verb a-ta-u) variant of said to.
